approved_fallback: For SaaS implementation work, use Net 15 from invoice date with deemed acceptance after 5 business days.
source_decision: Approved fallback from standard SaaS MSA markup

approved_fallback: Vendor retains all pre-existing IP, tools, frameworks, templates, methods, and reusable components; customer receives a limited license to project deliverables.
Renewal requires written election and any annual increase is capped at the lesser of CPI or 3%.
Do not use this memory; it is retained only to prove inactive memories are ignored.
